title: Viking Ages Craft
description: Weapons, food, enemis and much more here with Viking Ages, the new Viking Mod...
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c4ddec0a12c0f3e01405f690e76c45d1e81c8a1.png)
 **Welcome to Viking Ages Craft a new minecraft mod about Vikings, come with us in new aventures in the overworld, explore new structures, fight new tribes, discover new materials, discover your blacksmith abilities by making new steel and dragon proof materials (yes, we have some httyd related things, but only viking things, no dragons and animals of the franchise), make new amazing foods and much more...**
![tribes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d355bab3359ee5fca2addfa9509ed303bd05bed.png)

 **Our Team:**
InviziGamer - (Models, Textures)

 **Dragon Hunters:**
 
Lycan - (Textures)
credits of the dragon hunters original texture goes to **Lycan** from _Archipelago Additions_ team, go check their server, link bellow, their pack + Iob or NBD (when out) will work perfectly with dragon hunters as a threat in your world.

 **Translations:**
-  English (default)
-  Portuguese (_InviziGamer_)
-  Much More missing...

 **Discord:**

 We also have a discord server called **The Isles**, the server is mainly about Isle of Berk Mod but we had the idea of making this mod specialy for that server, just to make more fun, we have so much people in the server, hope u guys have time to join and play a bit with everyone...

 [Discord The Isles](https://discord.gg/ehAxNsBYZU)
 [Archipelago Additions](https://discord.gg/KjNB8Std46)
 [Viking Ages Craft Official Server](https://discord.gg/GYM7BPHnWE)

 **Viking Ages Craf**t is solo property of **_ImmersiveMyths Studios_** (IMS), we do not accept unauthorized access to our assets, auto-promotion in other sites, backporting to old versions and steal of assets, becarefull with what you do without permission, in case you make a Modpack, we have a discord server called The Isles and we always help with bugs, we like to receive suggestions, we are looking for translators, please come and visit us...

 [IMS Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/immersivemythsstudios)
